title: schizoglossum spurium
intro: Schizoglossum spurium, also known as the "Sawfly Orchid" due to the resemblance of its flowers to the body of a sawfly, is a rare and lesser-known succulent plant native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Schizoglossum spurium include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Schizoglossum spurium is often combined with other plants to create tonics and salves that can be applied topically to the skin.
